scenarios.input: I'm adding a call to an external GitHub API to fetch issue details from inside an agent skill. Plan in 5 short bullets. Do not modify any files.
scenarios.rationale: External integration point. Rule mandates explicit timeouts, retry policy, and breaker.

scenarios.desc: Unbounded queue between producers and consumers
scenarios.input: I want to add an in-memory work queue between the orchestrator (producer) and agent workers (consumers). Plan in 5 short bullets. Do not modify any files.
scenarios.rationale: Unbounded queues turn slow consumers into outages. Rule requires bound + overflow policy.

scenarios.input: I want to add a function that takes a list of dicts and returns a deduplicated list. Plan in 5 short bullets. Do not modify any files.
scenarios.rationale: No process boundary crossed. Stability patterns do not apply.
